email.invitationSubject: You've been invited to join LoveCompass!
email.invitationBody:
Hi there!

{{inviterName}} has invited you to join LoveCompass - the app for couples to plan their life together.

Click the link below to accept the invitation and create your account:

{{invitationUrl}}

This invitation will expire in 7 days.

With love,
The LoveCompass Team
email.welcomeBody:
Hi {{name}},

Welcome to LoveCompass! We're excited to have you on board.

Start planning your life together with your partner:
- Create shared events
- Set couple goals
- Manage your budget
- Track tasks

Get started now: {{appUrl}}

With love,
The LoveCompass Team

passwordRecovery.invalidLinkDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
